title: Multifaceted mirror array illuminator for fluorescence excitation-scanning spectral imaging microscopy.
author: Parker M Mayes SA Browning CM Deal J Gunn-Mayes S Annamdevula NS Rich TC Leavesley SJ
content:
S-EPMC9907356 PMC9907356 Multifaceted mirror array illuminator for fluorescence excitation-scanning spectral imaging microscopy.

Significance

Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) technologies offer great potential in fluorescence microscopy for multiplexed imaging, autofluorescence removal
